emailSignals.subject: Urgent: Verify your account to avoid suspension
emailSignals.snippet: Your account has been flagged for unusual sign-in activity. Verify your account now.
emailSignals.bodyPreview: Click here to confirm your credentials before your account is suspended. This is urgent action required.

emailSignals.subject: Invoice payment receipt attached
emailSignals.snippet: Please open the attachment and enable macros to view the invoice.
emailSignals.bodyPreview: Your invoice is ready. Download the file and run the installer to generate your receipt.

emailSignals.subject: Urgent CEO request wire transfer needed
emailSignals.snippet: This is an urgent request from your CEO. Please wire transfer funds immediately.
emailSignals.bodyPreview: Keep this confidential. Do not share this with anyone. Do not reply to this email.

emailSignals.subject: Your one-time authentication code
emailSignals.snippet: Use this one-time code to verify your identity. If you did not request this, reset your password.
emailSignals.bodyPreview: Sign in to confirm your account. Two-factor authentication is required for this action.

emailSignals.subject: Security incident: unauthorized access to your account
emailSignals.snippet: We detected a security incident affecting your account. Your data was exposed.
emailSignals.bodyPreview: A breach notification has been issued. Your account was compromised. Please take immediate action.

emailSignals.subject: June product digest tips and updates
emailSignals.snippet: This months digest covers improvements and events. Unsubscribe at any time.
emailSignals.bodyPreview: Read the full newsletter on our website. No action needed from you.

validFlags.subject: Urgent: Verify your account to avoid suspension
validFlags.description: Email impersonates account security team and requests credential verification via external link.
evidence: External domain does not match any known vendor
Contains urgent language designed to pressure immediate action
Link destination differs from displayed text

validFlags.subject: Invoice payment receipt attached
validFlags.description: Attachment with macro-enabled document sent from unknown billing domain.
evidence: Sender domain is not in approved vendor list
Email requests enabling macros which is a common malware delivery vector

validFlags.subject: Urgent CEO request wire transfer needed
validFlags.description: Classic BEC attempt posing as executive requesting urgent wire transfer.
evidence: CEO email domain does not match corporate domain
Requests secrecy and bypasses normal approval channels
No prior email thread with this sender
